Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Continued To Aug-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION TO TRANSFER to MARIN County
Off Calendar May-31-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Franceschini, via Zoom, for Steven Tappe and Linda Spegar, Trustees; Alexandria Carraher, via Zoom, for Susan Madrid, Janet Diepenbrock, and James Tappe, Beneficiaries.

The court points counsel to its tentative ruling to grant the Petition to Transfer this matter to Marin County. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the court's tentative ruling.

After brief, additional discussion, the court reconfirms its tentative ruing to transfer this matter to Marin County and the matter is taken under submission. The Petition to Compel Accounting, etc., is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

***After hearing: upon further consideration, a Status of Transfer is set for Jul-25-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 and the Petition to Compel Accounting, etc., is taken off calendar as it is being transferred.
